working_definition: A plasmacytoid dendritic cell present in prenatal human skin, characterized by expression of CD123 (IL3RA), CLEC4C (CD303/BDCA-2), and the master transcription factor TCF4 (E2-2). These cells are specialized producers of type I interferons (IFN-alpha/beta) in response to viral nucleic acids sensed via TLR7 and TLR9, and are found in fetal skin from the first trimester as part of the developing innate immune network.
searches_performed: OLS4 searchClasses: 'plasmacytoid dendritic cell' in CL ontology
snippet_search: 'plasmacytoid dendritic cell pDC prenatal skin' scoped to atlas DOI:10.1038/s41586-024-08002-x
snippet_search: 'plasmacytoid dendritic cell prenatal human skin immune development first trimester' broad search
snippet_search: 'plasmacytoid dendritic cell fetal human development ontogeny markers CLEC4C IRF7 TCF4' broad search

best_match.cl_definition: A dendritic cell type of distinct morphology, localization, and surface marker expression (CD123-positive) from other dendritic cell types and associated with early stage immune responses, particularly the release of physiologically abundant amounts of type I interferons in response to infection.

justification: The pDC population in the prenatal skin atlas is explicitly defined as 'plasmacytoid dendritic cells' in the UMAP legend (Fig. 1e) of Gopee et al. (2024). CL:0000784 describes a dendritic cell type that is CD123-positive and produces type I interferons, which directly matches the identity and canonical function of pDCs as characterised across the literature (Collin & Bigley 2018; Reizis et al. 2011). The prenatal developmental context does not alter the fundamental cell type identity. A more specific human term exists (CL:0001058, 'plasmacytoid dendritic cell, human') but CL:0000784 is the standard general term appropriate for atlas mapping.

other_candidates.cl_definition: This cell type is compatible with the HIPC Lyoplate markers for 'plasmacytoid dendritic cell'. The inclusion of HLA-DRA in the definition restricts this definition to human plasmacytoid dendritic cells.
other_candidates.reason_rejected: This is a more specific human-restricted term compatible with HIPC Lyoplate markers. CL:0000784 is the standard general term used for atlas annotations and is preferred for cross-species consistency.

recommendation: Map to CL:0000784 (plasmacytoid dendritic cell). No new CL term is needed.
